# render-contributions

Contributes a `Contributions.FacetTable` tab to the Studio Contributions view showing all HTTP/WS
routes aggregated across plugins, one row per route with method, path, runtime
(server/central), owning plugin, and endpoint-caller count columns. Reads
`node.facets["routes"]` for every plugin.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Aggregated cross-plugin routes table in the Studio Contributions view.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Contributions.FacetTable` "Routes"

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
